description: The bird was sitting near the top of a juniper tree for a few minutes. I took an unclear photo through the window. He flew away and I captured a better photo, again through the window. About 40 minutes later I saw it fly overhead, from the back of my house and over to the front, then he disappeared. My neighbor says he submitted my picture earlier today, but that he wasn’t sure if it worked. He called me while I was watching it in the tree, but he didn’t see it.
